name: Clicking "Search" in the top navigation bar navigates to the Search page
description:
As a user visiting the Sauce Demo site
  I want all header and footer links to be visible and navigate to the correct pages
  So that I can browse the site without broken or misdirected links
descriptionHtml:
As a user visiting the Sauce Demo site
I want all header and footer links to be visible and navigate to the correct pages
So that I can browse the site without broken or misdirected links

testStage.description:
As a user visiting the Sauce Demo site
  I want all header and footer links to be visible and navigate to the correct pages
  So that I can browse the site without broken or misdirected links

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage "https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/"
When  I click the "Search" link in the top navigation bar
Then  the page title should be "Search – Sauce Demo"

labels.name: story
labels.value: Clicking "Search" in the top navigation bar navigates to the Search page

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Clicking "Search" in the top navigation bar navigates to the Search page
